summary: Iteration 22: Tested Google Calendar integration for Villa Paris. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Google Calendar APIs correctly handle 'not connected' state, role-based access (ADMIN only), OAuth URL generation, and callback parameter handling.
seed_data_creation: None required - tested existing API behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Calendar integration fully tested. APIs correctly return 'Google Calendar non connesso' error when not connected. OAuth URL generation works. Role-based access enforced (ADMIN only). OAuth callback bypasses middleware auth. Frontend shows correct UI state for admin (GCal card visible) and worker (redirected away from impostazioni). Auto-sync calls in eventi/appuntamenti routes are non-blocking and don't crash when GCal not connected.

gcal_oauth_login.details: GET /api/oauth/google-calendar/login returns Google OAuth URL with accounts.google.com

gcal_sync_post_not_connected.details: POST /api/google-calendar/sync returns 400 with 'Google Calendar non connesso'

gcal_check_changes_not_connected.details: POST /api/google-calendar/check-changes returns 400 with 'Google Calendar non connesso'

gcal_disconnect.details: DELETE /api/google-calendar/sync returns success even when not connected

gcal_admin_only_access.details: All GCal APIs return 403 for WORKER and REPORT roles

oauth_callback_bypass_auth.details: GET /api/oauth/google-calendar/callback accessible without auth, redirects to /impostazioni?gcal=error

frontend_admin_gcal_card.details: Admin sees Google Calendar card with 'Connetti Google Calendar' button

frontend_oauth_success_param.details: ?gcal=success shows 'Google Calendar connesso con successo!' message

prisma_schema_gcal_models.details: Schema includes GoogleCalendarConfig, GoogleCalendarChange models, gcalEventId on Evento/Appuntamento

code_review_notes.google_calendar_lib: Well-structured OAuth2 client with auto-refresh token handling
code_review_notes.google_calendar_sync_lib: Non-blocking sync helpers with proper error handling (catch and log)
code_review_notes.middleware_bypass: OAuth callback correctly bypasses auth at line 99-101
code_review_notes.role_based_access: All GCal routes use requireAuth(req, ['ADMIN']) correctly
